channel.title: Menopause Sleep & Night Sweats — Hush
channel.description: Menopause Sleep & Night Sweats — hormone-free menopause self-care pins from Hush.

item.title: Menopause Night Sweats at 2am? You're Not the Only One
item.description: Menopause night sweats waking you at 2am? You're in good company. Why perimenopause and menopause bring night sweats and warm, broken nights, in plain language. A calm, hormone-free look at midlife self care. #menopause #nightsweats #perimenopause #midlifewomen #hormonefree
